title: Battle of Pinnacle Base
content:

Empire II'' 1]] |image=[[File:Battle_of_Pinnacle_Base.jpg]] |name=Battle of Pinnacle Base |conflict=[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] ([[Operation Shadow Hand]])''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |date=[[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] |place=[[Da Soocha V]] |result=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] victory **[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] is freed from the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark Side of the Force]] and betrays the [[Dark Empire]] **1st death of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] body |side1=New Republic |side2=*Dark Empire *[[Order of the Sith Lords]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*Luke Skywalker *[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] |commanders2=*[[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] Palpatine† *[[Supreme Commander (Galactic Empire)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] Luke Skywalker {{C|early battle}} |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*Two [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] *[[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] *[[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing escort starfighters]] *[[A-9 Vigilance interceptor]]s *[[DP20 gunship/Legends|DP20 frigates]] *[[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] *[[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]] *[[MC90 Star Cruiser]]s *[[MC80B Star Cruiser|MC80b Star Cruiser]]s |forces2=*One [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] *One [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] {{C|early battle}} *[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] *[[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttles]] *1 [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] *2 [[Allegiance-class battlecruiser|''Allegiance''-class battlecruisers]] {{C|referred to by New Republic forces as ''Imperial''-class}} *[[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']]† *[[Hyperspace/Legends|Hyperspace]] [[Wormhole/Legends|wormhole]] {{C|[[Force storm (wormhole)|Force storm]] origin}} |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Hundreds of New Republic ships and their crews |casual2=*Emperor Palpatine *''Eclipse'' |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|He's destroying the whole fleet! Thousands of warriors are dying!|Leia Organa Solo|}} The '''Battle of Pinnacle Base''' was fought between the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and the forces of the Reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] over the Republic base at the [[Da Soocha V|Pinnacle Moon]]. Some event of the battle was foretold by [[Bodo Baas's Master]]. ==Prelude== {{Quote|Soon, my young apprentice, your sister will be mine!''"
"''Yes, my master.|Emperor Palpatine and Luke Skywalker|[[Dark Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Empire'' audio drama]]}} After [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was taken to [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], he discovered that [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] still lived despite his death at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Skywalker, deciding it was the best way to defeat the [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] due to his ability to cheat death, became his apprentice. Later, Luke's twin sister [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] traveled there to attempt to rescue him. Unfortunately, she only succeeded in getting herself and her companions captured. However, Luke aided their escape and provided them with the command codes that controlled the [[World Devastator]]s ravaging [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]], allowing the New Republic to win the [[Battle of Calamari|battle]]. However, when Luke attempted to openly rebel against the Emperor, he was beaten into submission by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] during a contentious [[Duel on Byss|duel]] at the [[Emperor's Citadel]] on Byss. ===Palpatine's arrival=== {{Quote|Leaders of the Rebel Alliance, I have no quarrel with you. Give me the woman Jedi, sister of Skywalker… return the precious object she stole from me. A shuttle is waiting to send her to my ship, and then I will discuss a truce with the Alliance.|Palpatine makes his demands to the New Republic leaders|}} [[File:Palpatines_demands.jpg|thumb|left|100px|Emperor Palpatine making his demands to the New Republic via hologram, with a corrupted Luke Skywalker at his side.]] Arriving above Pinnacle Moon in the [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']] accompanied by two [[Allegiance-class battlecruiser|''Allegiance''-class battlecruisers]], a third ship and a subservient Luke in tow. Palpatine's sudden arrival caught the New Republic defenders off-guard, allowing the Sith Lord to make his demands to the Republic unchallenged. He demanded that Leia Organa Solo surrender to him and board his vessel, and bring along the [[Tedryn Holocron]], which she had stolen from him. Palpatine also promised that if the Republic complied with his demands, he would discuss a truce. After studying the prophecy of [[Bodo Baas's Master]] told to her by [[Bodo Baas|Baas's]] hologram, Leia willingly boarded ''Eclipse'', where Palpatine held her brother, Luke, under his influence. Attempting to break Organa and bring her unborn child under his influence, Palpatine goaded Skywalker into attacking her and proving himself still worthy of following the way of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]]. Parrying his attack with [[Leia's lightsaber/Legends|her lightsaber]], Leia reached out to Luke's lingering good side, and managed to bring Luke out of his mental captivity. The [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] turned on his former master. ==The battle== ===The duel=== {{Quote|My ally is the Force. Through the strength of the Force, your shroud of evil has been lifted from my mind.''"
"''So be it… THROUGH THE POWER OF THE FORCE YOU WILL DIE!|Luke Skywalker and Palpatine|}} [[File:L_versus_s.jpg|thumb|300px|Luke Skywalker, freed from Palpatine's influence with the support of his sister, duels the Emperor aboard the ''Eclipse''.]] Enraged, Palpatine brandished a [[Palpatine's blue-bladed lightsaber|blue-bladed lightsaber]] and attacked Luke. The two then engaged in a vicious lightsaber duel. The fight was powerful and brutal, with both combatants changing battle positions, utilizing several fighting styles and trading numerous blows. Even Leia, who was watching the fight, could not even see any movements; but she could feel the tremendous power of the clash, as titanic waves of light and darkness; eventually, the light was winning. Despite his viciousness and tremendous power, Palpatine was finally driven off guard and defeated by Luke, who was aided by his sister's [[Force harmony]], losing his left hand. ===Force storm=== {{Quote|He's creating another ''force storm'', Luke! He's destroying the whole fleet! Thousands of warriors are dying!''"
"''Yes! Did I not warn you? I've played along with your Jedi dueling games long enough! ''Now'' you will experience my full potency...I live as ''energy''...I AM the Dark Side!''"
"''Listen to me, Leia...We can stop him...I've read his ''Dark Books''. According to his own word, he has awakened a chaos even ''he'' cannot control! Join your power to mine, Leia.|Leia, Palpatine, and Luke as the two Jedi use the Force to turn Palpatine's Force storm against him.|}} [[File:Palpatineeclipse.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Consumed by his own Force storm and cut off from the Dark Side by Luke and Leia, the reborn Emperor perished aboard the ''Eclipse''.]] Despite losing his hand, the Sith Lord was hardly defeated. He claimed that he saw through the dark side that Luke wanted to overthrow him and take his place as Emperor. Declaring that the Jedi underestimated his power, and enraged by the loss of his limb, Palpatine summoned a [[Force storm (wormhole)|Force storm]] and began to destroy the New Republic fleet. Using the Force, Skywalker and Organa Solo surrounded the Emperor with a wave of [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]] energy, cutting him off from the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]], and, thus, his power. With Palpatine unable to control the storm, it spun out of control and began to devour the ''Eclipse''. The Skywalker siblings escaped the ship as it was torn apart, taking Palpatine's current incarnation with it. After destroying the ''Eclipse'', the storm quickly dissipated. It is unknown if ''Eclipse''{{'s}} escort fleet retreated or engaged the remnant of the Republic fleet, or were destroyed when Palpatine lost control of the Force storm. It is probable that they retreated, as the Republic fleet still held numerical superiority, meaning an eventual New Republic victory. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|One Jedi cannot conquer the dark side alone...I guess we've proved that. ''Together'' we were a Jedi fire that outshone his evil.''"
"''Two are more powerful than one...''Three'' are more powerful than two. I felt ''another'' join us, Luke...my third child. He's going to be a very great Jedi.''"
"''Your children...the holocron..this is the beginning, Leia--I feel it, ''great'' things are coming. The Jedi Knights ''will'' rise again.|Luke Skywalker and Leia Organa Solo, in the immediate aftermath of the battle.|}} At the time, it was believed that the Emperor was destroyed aboard his capital ship. However, Palpatine's spirit survived, eventually transferring his essence to a new body. Pinnacle Base, and the entire planet of Da Soocha V were later [[Destruction of Da Soocha V|destroyed]] by a single projectile from the Reborn Emperor's new [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]; the [[Galaxy Gun]].[[Dark Empire II 5|''Dark Empire II'' 5]] ==Behind the scenes== [[File:Palpatine_Luke_Leia_EGTF.jpg|thumb|250px|Luke Skywalker and Leia Organa Solo confront Palpatine.]] The Battle of Pinnacle Base first appeared in the issue [[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]] of the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Empire]]'' series of comics. The battle was conceived and written by author [[Tom Veitch]], illustrated by artist [[Cam Kennedy]], with cover art by [[Dave Dorman]]. Veitch used this as the climax of the story; pitting the Sith Lord Emperor Palpatine against the Jedi Knight Luke Skywalker and his sister Leia Organa Solo. The Battle of Pinnacle Base would eventually be featured in the [[Dark Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Empire'' audio drama]], which witnessed the climax take on a whole new personality through the voice acting of [[John Cygan]] (Luke Skywalker), [[Ann Patricio]] (Princess Leia) and [[Nick Jameson]] (Emperor Palpatine). This duel features an interesting reversal in that the Jedi involved is wielding a red lightsaber and the Sith involved is wielding a blue-bladed weapon. The confrontation between Luke Skywalker/Leia Organa Solo and Emperor Palpatine's clone is depicted in [[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']], though there are some mistakes. The description says that the meeting took place on Byss instead of on the Eclipse. Moreover, Luke wields a green-bladed lightsaber instead of the red one. ==Appearances== *[[Dark Empire (audio drama)|''Dark Empire'' audio drama]] *[[Dark Empire 6|''Dark Empire'' 6]] {{1st}} *''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{Imo}} *''[[Fate of the Jedi: Omen]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Omen (audiobook)}} {{Imo}} ==Sources== *''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]'' {{1stID|Battle of Pinnacle Base}} *''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Shadow Hand}} {{Interlang |es=Batalla de la Base Pinnacle }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Pinnacle Base, Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Da Soocha V]] [[Category:Battles of Operation Shadow Hand]] [[Category:Duels]]
